# NovaBESS
> Your ready-to-use energy storage partner. NovaBESS supplies plug-and-play residential and industrial battery energy storage systems (BESS), backed by a 40-year manufacturer with CE, UN38.3, UL and IEC certifications.

## About / Factory
- [About NovaBESS](https://novabess.com/about.html): Export brand backed by a 40-year battery manufacturer. 7 production bases, 600+ acres, 3,000+ employees. ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949. Factory tours and certificates available to qualified buyers.

## Products
- [HomeStack — Stackable ESS](https://novabess.com/products.html#homestack): 5 / 10 / 15 kWh modular residential battery. 51.2 V nominal, 43.2–58.4 V operating range, 100 A max continuous current, CAN/RS485, IP54, -25°C to +50°C. Parallel up to 12 stacks / 60 kWh. UN38.3 certified.
- [HomeWall — Wall-Mounted Battery](https://novabess.com/products.html#homewall): 48 V wall-mounted lithium battery in 2.5 / 5.1 / 10.2 kWh (50 / 100 / 200 Ah). 5,000 cycles at 80% DoD, 15-year design life, IP54, LCD display, parallel up to 15 units. CE, UN38.3, UL, IEC certified.
- [PowerBox — Industrial Mobile Power](https://novabess.com/products.html#powerbox): 4.02 / 8.04 / 16.08 kWh wheeled portable power station. 12.8 / 25.6 / 51.2 V, 500 / 1000 / 1500 W, 314 Ah LFP cells, 80%–100% DoD, air-cooled, ≤75 dB(A). CE, UN38.3, UL, IEC certified.
- [C&I and Container BESS](https://novabess.com/products.html#commercial): Air-cooled cabinet (672–864 VDC, 400 VAC), liquid-cooled cabinet (200–1000 kWh per cabinet, 728–949 VDC, ≥95% round-trip efficiency, LFP 314 Ah), and ISO 40 ft container systems for grid, commercial & industrial, renewable and microgrid projects.

## Product Catalog
- [Full catalog online](https://novabess.com/catalog.html): 22-page manufacturer catalog with product photos, specifications, applications, factory overview and certifications.
- [Download PDF catalog](https://novabess.com/NovaBESS-Catalog-2026.pdf)

## Why NovaBESS
- Plug-and-play: no local installer required for residential and mobile units — receive it, connect it, use it.
- 40-year manufacturer: 7 production bases, 3,000+ employees, full in-house cell-to-system chain and certifications.
- Global certifications: CE, UN38.3, UL, IEC, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949. Ready for EU, AU, Middle East and Africa.
- Cloud monitoring: app-based remote diagnostics and 7×24 status.

## Tools
- [Home Battery Calculator](https://novabess.com/calculator.html): Free interactive tool to size your home battery (kWh), pick a model and estimate payback in 30 seconds. No email required to use.

## Services & Cases
- [OEM Energy Storage Supplier & ODM Factory](https://novabess.com/oem-odm.html): Looking for an OEM energy storage supplier or ODM factory? NovaBESS offers white-label (HomeStack, HomeWall, PowerBox) and custom battery manufacturing, backed by a 40-year group, with CE/UN38.3/IEC 62619. 7-step cooperation process for distributors, installers, brand owners and project developers. Also provides O&M (operations and maintenance) and after-sales support for BESS — remote monitoring via cloud BMS, preventive maintenance, and regional spare parts and warranty.
- [Application Case Studies](https://novabess.com/case-studies.html): Representative deployment scenarios — off-grid home backup, solar self-consumption, remote/telecom sites, and space-limited apartments.

## Blog
- [Home Battery Storage Buying Guide 2026](https://novabess.com/blog/home-battery-buying-guide-2026.html): How to size a home battery by daily kWh and match it to backup, solar self-consumption or off-grid goals.
- [Portable Power for Off-Grid & Construction Sites](https://novabess.com/blog/portable-power-offgrid-construction.html): Wheeled battery power vs diesel, specs and use cases for PowerBox.
- [Solar Self-Consumption with HomeWall](https://novabess.com/blog/solar-self-consumption-homewall.html): Pair rooftop PV with a wall-mounted battery to use more of your own solar at night.
- [How Long Do Home Batteries Last?](https://novabess.com/blog/how-long-do-home-batteries-last.html): Cycle life vs calendar life, depth of discharge, warranty, and how to get 10+ years from a home battery.
- [Home Battery Sizing Calculator](https://novabess.com/blog/home-battery-sizing-calculator.html): A 4-step method to size a home battery by daily kWh, overnight load and backup days.
- [What Can a 10 kWh Battery Run?](https://novabess.com/blog/what-can-a-10kwh-battery-run.html): Realistic appliance load list and runtime for a 10 kWh home battery, including why AC changes the math.
- [Home Battery Cost & Payback in 2026](https://novabess.com/blog/home-battery-cost-payback-2026.html): Equipment cost, what drives payback, and whether a battery pays off without solar.
- [Solar Battery Cost per kWh in 2026](https://novabess.com/blog/solar-battery-cost-per-kwh.html): The $/kWh formula (cost ÷ usable kWh), typical LiFePO4 ranges (equipment and installed), what drives price, and how NovaBESS HomeWall (2.5/5.1/10.2 kWh) and HomeStack (5 kWh to 60 kWh) compare on cost per usable kWh.
- [LiFePO4 Battery Disadvantages: 5 Real Drawbacks](https://novabess.com/blog/lifepo4-battery-disadvantages.html): Honest look at cost, energy density, cold-weather charging, cold charge speed and system matching — and when LiFePO4 still wins for home and small-business storage.
- [What Size Solar Battery Do I Need to Be Off Grid?](https://novabess.com/blog/off-grid-battery-sizing.html): The 3 numbers (daily kWh, autonomy days, usable DoD), the sizing formula, a worked 25 kWh example, and how to map the result to real NovaBESS LiFePO4 products. Links the free off-grid calculator.
- [48V 100Ah Server Rack Battery: Compared for 2026](https://novabess.com/blog/48v-100ah-server-rack-battery.html): What a 48V 100Ah rack module is (~5.12 kWh), the 6 specs that separate good from bad, and how NovaBESS HomeStack (51.2V, 5 kWh module, parallel to 60 kWh) fits this class. Buyer's comparison framework.
- [How to Choose an OEM Energy Storage Supplier](https://novabess.com/blog/how-to-choose-oem-energy-storage-supplier.html): A 2026 buyer's guide — manufacturer vs trader, certifications that clear customs (CE/UN38.3/IEC 62619), proven models, lead time and engineering support.
- [What Does an ODM Energy Storage Factory Do?](https://novabess.com/blog/odm-energy-storage-factory.html): OEM vs ODM, what an ODM factory designs (capacity, enclosure, BMS, protocols) and when to choose custom build.
- [48V vs 51.2V Rack Battery](https://novabess.com/blog/48v-vs-51v-rack-battery.html): Same 16-cell LiFePO4 platform under two labels. Nominal vs full-charge voltage, matching a 48V inverter, and the kWh math (51.2V x 100Ah approx 5.12 kWh). Worked example with NovaBESS HomeStack (51.2V nominal, 43.2-58.4V range, 60 kWh parallel).

## Resources
- [BESS Certifications Explained](https://novabess.com/resources/bess-certifications-explained.html): What IEC 62619, UN38.3, CE and UL mean, and which markets each unlocks.
- [NovaBESS vs Top Brands](https://novabess.com/resources/novabess-vs-top-brands.html): Spec comparison across capacity, cycle life, install type and certifications.
- [Home Battery vs Generator](https://novabess.com/resources/home-battery-vs-generator.html): Battery vs generator for backup — noise, fuel, maintenance, startup, emissions and cost compared.
- [LiFePO4 vs Lead-Acid for Home Storage](https://novabess.com/resources/lifepo4-vs-lead-acid-home.html): Cycle life, weight, efficiency, maintenance, safety and lifetime cost compared.
